name: DoorDash, Inc.
description: DoorDash, Inc. operates a logistics platform that connects consumers with their favorite local businesses in the United States and internationally. The company's platform enables local businesses to address consumers' needs of ease and convenience, and enables merchants to establish an online presence, market their offerings, and fulfill orders. It offers DoorDash Marketplace, which provides merchant services, consumer services, and Dasher services; and Drive, a white-label delivery service that enables merchants to fulfill orders through their own channels.
